---
title: "Sharezone"
subtitle: "Resources from QuantLab sessions"
---

Download slides, tutorials, and code from our QuantLunch sessions.

---

# 2026 {#sec-2026}

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.card}
### Analysing Qualitative Data with LLMs
**31 Mar 2026** | Dr. Seraphine F. Maerz

[View Slides](quallmer_slides.html){.btn .btn-primary}

:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.card}
![](pics/logo.png){width=80%}

### Quallmer Tutorial
**Hands-on:** Analyzing Political Speeches with LLMs

[View Tutorial](quallmer_tutorial.html){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.card .password-protected}
### Workshop at Griffith
**LLM Masterclass** | April 2026
<span class="participants-note">(for participants only)</span>

<div class="password-form" id="griffith-form">
  <input type="password" id="griffith-password" placeholder="Enter password">
  <button class="btn-unlock" onclick="checkPassword()">Unlock</button>
</div>
<div class="password-error" id="griffith-error">Incorrect password</div>

<div class="download-links" id="griffith-downloads">
[Preparation Guide (PDF)](brisbane/Preparations_LLM_Masterclass.pdf){.btn .btn-primary download="Preparations_LLM_Masterclass.pdf"}
[View Tutorial (QMD)](brisbane/quallmer_tutorial.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[View Slides](brisbane/quallmer_slides.html){.btn .btn-primary}
</div>

<script>
function checkPassword() {
  var password = document.getElementById('griffith-password').value;
  var downloads = document.getElementById('griffith-downloads');
  var error = document.getElementById('griffith-error');
  var form = document.getElementById('griffith-form');

  if (password === 'quallmer') {
    downloads.classList.add('visible');
    form.style.display = 'none';
    error.classList.remove('visible');
  } else {
    error.classList.add('visible');
  }
}

document.getElementById('griffith-password').addEventListener('keypress', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Enter') {
    checkPassword();
  }
});
</script>
:::
:::

:::

---

# Archive (2024-2025)

Looking for older session materials? Find slides and resources from previous years on our GitHub repository.

[Browse Archive on GitHub](https://github.com/quantilab/sharezone/tree/main){.btn .btn-primary}

---

# Contribute

Have resources to share? [Open an issue](https://github.com/quantilab/sharezone/issues) or reach out to [Seraphine Maerz](mailto:seraphine.maerz@unimelb.edu.au).
